<!--
  ⚠️ BlastRadius does not accept external contributions.

  This repository is published as a read-only reference under the
  MIT license. You are free to:
    - Fork it
    - Modify your fork
    - Use the modified version in your own projects (commercial or not)
    - Publish your fork under its own name

  …but pull requests against this upstream repository will not be
  reviewed or merged. Please do not invest time preparing one expecting
  it to land here.

  If you found a bug, a fix is welcome in your fork. If you want to
  report a security issue, follow the SECURITY.md disclosure path
  instead — those receive a response.

  If you read this and still want to open the PR for your own
  archival or to share context publicly, you are welcome to. Just be
  aware it will be closed unmerged.
-->

This repository is published as a **read-only reference**. Pull
requests are not reviewed or merged.

If you found a bug or want to extend BlastRadius, please **fork the
repository** and publish your changes there. Security issues follow
the disclosure path documented in [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md).

Thanks for understanding.
